race.comment: Lots of winning chances. AZONTO (3) was runner-up over a mile two back then back in trip and kept coming last time. Drawn for a good run and deserves a win. RESPITE and REGAL HUNTER are two progressive types who fought out the finish of a Class 1 last time. RESPITE (6) relished the extra ground and scored by a nose. Has upside and drops a kilo. Expected to measure up again. Same goes for REGAL HUNTER (4) who was narrowly defeated and meets the winner a kilo better. Also has upside and can measure up. TIKKEN (2) is honest and goes well here. The query is the trip but honest and best figures stack up. COASTAL STRIKE (8) is a third-up winner and should be ready to peak. Tricky gate but has pace and will give a sight.
